author: Siliconera
text:
My Favorite Vtuber Is Scary IRL Volume 2 Focuses on Communication
Volume 2 of the My Favorite Vtuber Is Scary IRL manga succeeds because these folks are communicating even when it's difficult.

author: Siliconera
text:
I’m No Angel Feels Like a Typical Ai Yazawa Manga
People who already enjoy Ai Yazawa manga will find I’m No Angel features similar sorts of relationship dynamics and character development.

author: Siliconera
text:
The Black ‘Cat’ in the Kuro Complete Edition Manga Always Steals the Show
While Coco and her pet Kuro are the two stars of the Kuro Complete Edition manga, the black "cat" is an absolute scene stealer.
